text.zh: 第一次見到我時，你最先注意到我「哪裡」？
text.en: When you first saw me, what was the first thing you noticed about me?

text.zh: 我平常「哪個小動作」，會讓你覺得很可愛？
text.en: What little habit or gesture of mine do you find cute?

text.zh: 你最喜歡我「哪一種打扮」？
text.en: What kind of outfit do you like best on me?

text.zh: 剛認識的時候，哪件事讓你開始「期待見到我」？
text.en: Back when we first met, what made you start looking forward to seeing me?

text.zh: 在人群裡，你通常會先注意到我的「哪個小細節」？
text.en: In a crowd, what small detail about me do you usually notice first?

text.zh: 最近有哪個「瞬間」，讓你覺得我很迷人？
text.en: Was there a recent moment when you found me especially charming?

text.zh: 你覺得我做什麼事的時候，特別「吸引人」？
text.en: When do you find me especially attractive?

text.zh: 我說話的哪個「樣子」，會讓你特別喜歡？
text.en: What do you like most about the way I talk?

text.zh: 有沒有哪個瞬間，看著我做某件事，心裡突然有點捨不得移開眼睛？
text.en: Has there ever been a moment when you watched me doing something and just couldn't look away?

text.zh: 我做過哪件「小事」，讓你後來想起來還是會心動？
text.en: What little thing have I done that still makes your heart skip a beat when you think about it later?

text.zh: 你有沒有一種「明明旁邊有別人，但你只感覺到我」的時刻？
text.en: Have you ever had a moment when other people were around, but I was the only one you were aware of?

text.zh: 如果我們「重新認識一次」，你覺得我哪裡還是會吸引你？
text.en: If we met all over again, what about me would still draw you in?

text.zh: 你有沒有一個「喜歡我」的地方，其實很少說出口？
text.en: Is there something you like about me that you rarely say out loud?

text.zh: 我看你的「哪種眼神」，最容易讓你心動？
text.en: What kind of look from me makes your heart race the most?

text.zh: 有沒有哪次我突然「靠近」，讓你有點緊張？
text.en: Has there ever been a time when I suddenly got close and made you a little nervous?

text.zh: 只有我們兩個人的時候，我哪一種「靠近」會讓你最心動？
text.en: When it's just the two of us, what way of getting close to you makes your heart race the most?

text.zh: 最近一次在心裡默默覺得「好想立刻抱緊你」，是什麼時候？
text.en: When was the last time you quietly thought, "I really want to hold you tight right now"?

text.zh: 關於我的「味道、體溫或靠近你的感覺」，你最喜歡哪一種記憶？
text.en: What's your favorite memory of my scent, my warmth, or the feeling of me close to you?

text.zh: 什麼樣的「曖昧氣氛」，會讓你特別想靠近我？
text.en: What kind of spark would make you want to pull me closer?

text.zh: 有沒有某個時刻，你其實很期待我主動「碰你一下」？
text.en: Was there ever a moment when you were secretly hoping I'd reach out and touch you first?
